---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for openDesk Edu
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves

Which problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a specific university use case?

## Proposed solution

Describe your preferred solution. If you have technical ideas (Helm chart structure, integration approach), share them.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## University context

- **University size**: (e.g., <5k, 5k-25k, 25k-50k, 50k+ students)
- **Campus management system**: (e.g., HISinOne/Marvin, HISinOne native, other)
- **Identity federation**: (e.g., DFN-AAI, Shibboleth, custom IdP)
- **Existing LMS**: (e.g., ILIAS, Moodle, Stud.IP, none)

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots that would help.
